description: Local gotcha DB — seeded quirks for Reality Capture and memos; verify every line with the AHJ.

rules.summary: Plano plan review has been known to insist on a specific thermal-break / insulation detail at MEP roof or wall penetrations—confirm the current amendment sheet against your sleeve detail before rough-in.

Light commercial rows near the Domain: some AHJs reference **Design Criteria** plus stricter **above-ceiling / underfloor** access for data / IDF rooms—coordinate ceiling tiles and tray cover sheets early.
Many master-planned parcels require **HOA architectural review** even for **EVSE** surface mounts; leave lead time for ARC submission alongside city electrical permit.
